messages.content: You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como criar um Log Group e configurar logs customizados no OCI via Terraform?

Para criar Log Groups e configurar logs customizados no OCI via Terraform:

1. **Crie o Log Group**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log_group" "app_log_group" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "application-log-group"
  description    = "Log group for production applications"
}
```

2. **Crie um Service Log (logs automáticos do OCI)**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log" "vcn_flow_log" {
  display_name = "vcn-flow-logs"
  log_group_id = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "SERVICE"

  configuration {
    source {
      category    = "flowlogs"
      resource    = var.vcn_ocid
      source_type = "OCISERVICE"
    }
  }

  retention_duration = 30
}
```

3. **Crie um Custom Log (logs da aplicação)**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log" "app_custom_log" {
  display_name = "app-custom-logs"
  log_group_id = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "CUSTOM"

  configuration {
    source {
      category    = "application"
      source_type = "CUSTOM"
    }
  }

  retention_duration = 90
}
```

4. **Categorias de Service Logs disponíveis**:
- `flowlogs`: VCN Flow Logs
- `all`: Todos os logs do serviço
- `invocation`: OCI Functions invocation
- `audit`: OCI Audit logs

5. **Retention**:
- Range: 1 a 365 dias
- [MUTABLE] O custo de retenção varia por volume

6. **Após criar, configure o OCI Logging Agent nas instâncias** para enviar logs customizados:
```bash
sudo /opt/oracle-azure-agent/agent.py enable logging
```

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/Tasks/configuringlogs.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como criar alarms de monitoring no OCI com notificações via Terraform?

Para criar alarms de monitoring com notificações no OCI via Terraform:

1. **Crie o Notification Topic**:
```hcl
resource "oci_ons_notification_topic" "alarm_topic" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  name           = "critical-alarms-topic"
}
```

2. **Adicione subscribers (email, Slack, PagerDuty)**:
```hcl
resource "oci_ons_subscription" "email_subscriber" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  topic_id       = oci_ons_notification_topic.alarm_topic.id
  protocol       = "EMAIL"
  endpoint       = "ops-team@example.com"
}

resource "oci_ons_subscription" "webhook_subscriber" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  topic_id       = oci_ons_notification_topic.alarm_topic.id
  protocol       = "CUSTOM_HTTPS"
  endpoint       = "https://SEU_ENDPOINT_WEBHOOK_SLACK"
}
```

3. **Crie o Alarm**:
```hcl
resource "oci_monitoring_alarm" "cpu_alarm" {
  compartment_id     = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name       = "high-cpu-alarm"
  is_enabled         = true

  # Métrica
  metric_compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  namespace            = "oci_computeagent"
  resource_group       = "production"
  metric_name          = "CpuUtilization"
  statistic            = "MAX"
  interval             = "5m"

  # Condição
  threshold            = 85
  pending_duration     = "PT5M"
  severity             = "CRITICAL"

  # Notificação
  destinations {
    service_type = "ONS"
    topic_id     = oci_ons_notification_topic.alarm_topic.id
  }

  body = "A CPU utilization exceeded 85% for more than 5 minutes on {resourceDisplayName}."
}
```

4. **Alarm de memória (requer monitoring agent)**:
```hcl
resource "oci_monitoring_alarm" "memory_alarm" {
  compartment_id      = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name        = "high-memory-alarm"
  is_enabled          = true
  metric_compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  namespace           = "oci_computeagent"
  metric_name         = "MemoryUtilization"
  statistic           = "MAX"
  interval            = "5m"
  threshold           = 90
  pending_duration    = "PT5M"
  severity            = "WARNING"

  destinations {
    service_type = "ONS"
    topic_id     = oci_ons_notification_topic.alarm_topic.id
  }
}
```

5. **Namespaces comuns de métricas**:
- `oci_computeagent`: Métricas de instâncias (requer agente)
- `oci_blockstorage`: Block Volumes
- `oci_loadbalancer`: Load Balancers
- `oci_database`: Databases
- `oci_apigateway`: API Gateway

6. **Severidades**:
- `CRITICAL`: Ação imediata necessária
- `WARNING`: Atenção necessária
- `INFO`: Informativo

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/Tasks/creatingalarms.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como configurar o APM Domain e instrumentar aplicações para tracing no OCI?

Para configurar APM Domain e instrumentar aplicações no OCI:

1. **Crie o APM Domain**:
```hcl
resource "oci_apm_apm_domain" "prod_apm" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "production-apm-domain"
  description    = "APM domain for production microservices"
  is_free_tier   = false
}
```

2. **Crie o APM Config para tracing**:
```hcl
resource "oci_apm_apm_config" "java_tracing" {
  apm_domain_id = oci_apm_apm_domain.prod_apm.id
  display_name  = "java-tracing-config"
  config_type   = "TRACING"

  is_enabled = true
  config_group = "default"
}
```

3. **Instrumentação Java (auto-instrumentation)**:
```bash
# Download do Java Agent
wget https://objectstorage.<region>.oraclecloud.com/p/.../java-agent.jar

# Configure a variável de ambiente
export JAVA_OPTS="-javaagent:/path/to/java-agent.jar \
  -Doracle.apm.agent.registration.connectString=<apm-domain-endpoint>:443 \
  -Doracle.apm.agent.registration.secure=true \
  -Doracle.apm.dataKeys=service.name=payment-service,service.environment=production"
```

4. **Instrumentação via OCI Functions**:
```hcl
resource "oci_functions_application" "traced_app" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "traced-fn-app"
  subnet_ids     = [var.subnet_ocid]

  trace_config {
    domain_id  = oci_apm_apm_domain.prod_apm.id
    is_enabled = true
  }
}
```

5. **Instrumentação Python (OpenTelemetry)**:
```bash
pip install opentelemetry-distro opentelemetry-exporter-otlp

opentelemetry-bootstrap -a install

export OTEL_SERVICE_NAME="payment-service"
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT="https://<apm-domain-endpoint>"
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="apm_domain_id=<apm-domain-ocid>"

opentelemetry-instrument python app.py
```

6. **APM Domains - tipos de dados coletados**:
- **Traces**: Distributed tracing de requisições
- **Metrics**: Métricas de performance (latência, throughput, error rate)
- **Synthetics**: Monitoramento sintético de endpoints
- **RUM**: Real User Monitoring para browsers

7. **Comparação multi-cloud**:
- OCI APM ≈ AWS X-Ray + CloudWatch RUM
- OCI APM ≈ Azure Application Insights
- OCI APM ≈ GCP Cloud Trace + Cloud Monitoring

[CHECK DOCS] O endpoint do APM domain é obtido após a criação.

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/apm/overview.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como configurar métricas customizadas no OCI Monitoring via Terraform?

Para publicar e configurar métricas customizadas no OCI Monitoring:

1. **O OCI Monitoring suporta métricas customizadas via API/SDK**:
```hcl
# Não há resource Terraform direto para postar métricas
# Use o OCI CLI ou SDK para publicar

# Exemplo com OCI CLI:
# oci monitoring metric-data post \
#   --compartment-id <compartment-ocid> \
#   --metric-data '[{
#     "compartmentId": "<compartment-ocid>",
#     "namespace": "custom-app-metrics",
#     "resourceGroup": "payment-service",
#     "name": "order-processing-time",
#     "dimensions": {"region": "sa-saopaulo-1"},
#     "datapoints": [{
#       "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
#       "value": 245.5,
#       "count": 1
#     }]
#   }]'
```

2. **Crie alarm para métrica customizada**:
```hcl
resource "oci_monitoring_alarm" "custom_metric_alarm" {
  compartment_id      = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name        = "high-order-processing-time"
  is_enabled          = true
  metric_compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  namespace           = "custom-app-metrics"
  resource_group      = "payment-service"
  metric_name         = "order-processing-time"
  statistic           = "AVG"
  interval            = "1m"
  threshold           = 500
  pending_duration    = "PT2M"
  severity            = "CRITICAL"

  destinations {
    service_type = "ONS"
    topic_id     = oci_ons_notification_topic.alarm_topic.id
  }
}
```

3. **Exemplo de publicação via Python SDK**:
```python
import oci
from oci.monitoring import MonitoringClient
from oci.monitoring.models import MetricDataDetails, PostMetricDataDetails
import datetime

config = oci.config.from_file()
monitoring = MonitoringClient(config)

metric_data = MetricDataDetails(
    compartment_id="<compartment-ocid>",
    namespace="custom-app-metrics",
    resource_group="payment-service",
    name="order-processing-time",
    dimensions={"region": "sa-saopaulo-1"},
    datapoints=[{
        "timestamp": datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z",
        "value": 245.5,
        "count": 1
    }]
)

monitoring.post_metric_data(
    post_metric_data_details=PostMetricDataDetails(
        metric_data=[metric_data]
    )
)
```

4. **Namespaces customizados - regras**:
- Deve começar com letra
- Apenas letras, números, underscores, hífens
- Máximo 255 caracteres
- Evite prefixo `oci_` (reservado para serviços OCI)

5. **Use cases comuns**:
- Tempo de processamento de filas
- Contagem de transações por segundo
- Taxa de erro de negócio
- Queue depth de mensageria
- Custom business metrics

[MUTABLE] O limite de datapoints por post pode variar.

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/Concepts/monitoringoverview.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como integrar OCI Logging com OCI Monitoring para criar alertas baseados em logs?

Para integrar OCI Logging com Monitoring e criar alertas baseados em logs:

1. **Crie a infraestrutura de logs**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log_group" "app_log_group" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "app-log-group"
}

resource "oci_logging_log" "app_error_log" {
  display_name = "app-error-log"
  log_group_id = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "CUSTOM"
  configuration {
    source {
      category    = "errors"
      source_type = "CUSTOM"
    }
  }
  retention_duration = 90
}
```

2. **Crie um Log Saved Search para queries frequentes**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log_saved_search" "error_search" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "critical-errors-search"
  log_group_id   = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id

  query = "* | where data.severity = \"ERROR\" and data.message matches \"OutOfMemory\" | sort by datetime desc"
  is_enabled = true
}
```

3. **Use OCI Events para trigger baseado em logs**:
```hcl
resource "oci_events_rule" "log_based_alarm" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "log-error-alarm"
  is_enabled     = true

  condition = jsonencode({
    "eventType": [
      "com.oraclecloud.loggingingestion.customlog"
    ]
  })

  actions {
    actions {
      action_type = "ONS"
      is_enabled  = true
      topic_id    = oci_ons_notification_topic.log_alarm_topic.id
    }
  }
}
```

4. **Alternativa: OCI Functions para processamento de logs**:
```hcl
resource "oci_functions_function" "log_processor" {
  application_id = oci_functions_application.log_app.id
  display_name   = "log-error-processor"
  image          = "${var.region}.ocir.io/${var.namespace}/log-processor:latest"
  memory_in_mbs  = 256

  config = {
    "LOG_GROUP_ID"  = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
    "ALARM_TOPIC_ID" = oci_ons_notification_topic.log_alarm_topic.id
  }
}
```

5. **Query patterns úteis**:
```sql
-- Contagem de erros por hora
* | where data.severity = "ERROR" | stats count() by bin(1h)

-- Erros específicos
* | where data.message matches "timeout" | sort by datetime desc

-- Log de uma instância específica
* | where data.resourceId = "ocid1.instance.oc1..xxx"
```

6. **Arquitetura recomendada**:
```
Application → OCI Logging (custom logs)
    ↓
OCI Events (pattern matching)
    ↓
OCI Notifications (alertar time)
    ↓
OCI Functions (auto-remediation opcional)
```

7. **Limitações**:
- OCI Monitoring não suporta métricas diretamente de logs
- É necessário usar Events + Functions ou um agente externo
- Para métricas derivadas de logs, considere o OCI Logging Analytics

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/Concepts/querylanguage.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Meu alarm de monitoring não está disparando mesmo com a métrica acima do threshold. Como debugar?

Para debugar alarms de monitoring que não disparam no OCI:

1. **Verifique o estado do alarm**:
```bash
oci monitoring alarm get --alarm-id <alarm-ocid>
oci monitoring alarm list --compartment-id <compartment-ocid>
```

2. **Checklist de troubleshooting**:

**a) Métrica existe e está sendo coletada?**
```bash
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics-data \
  --compartment-id <compartment-ocid> \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) \
  --end-time $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**b) O agente de monitoring está rodando?**
```bash
# Na instância
sudo systemctl status oracle-cloud-agent
sudo /opt/oracle-azure-agent/agent.py status
```

**c) O compartment da métrica está correto?**
- `metric_compartment_id` deve ser o compartment onde o recurso existe
- Não confundir com o compartment onde o alarm está definido

**d) O interval e pending_duration estão corretos?**
```hcl
# Problema comum: interval muito longo
interval         = "5m"   # Verifica a cada 5 minutos
pending_duration = "PT5M" # Precisa estar acima do threshold por 5 minutos
# Total: pode levar até 10 minutos para disparar
```

**e) A resource_group está correta?**
```hcl
# Se a métrica tem resource_group, o alarm deve especificar
resource_group = "production"  # Deve match exatamente
```

3. **Erros comuns**:
- Namespace errado (`oci_compute` vs `oci_computeagent`)
- Metric name com typo
- Compartment ID incorreto
- Alarm desabilitado (`is_enabled = false`)
- Destination topic não existe ou subscriber inválido
- Threshold em unidade errada (bytes vs MB vs %)

4. **Verifique o notification delivery**:
```bash
oci ons notification-topic list --compartment-id <compartment-ocid>
oci ons subscription list --topic-id <topic-ocid>
```

5. **Teste o alarm manualmente**:
```hcl
# Temporarily lower the threshold
threshold = 0.001
# Apply and check if notification arrives
```

6. **Verifique logs do alarm**:
- No OCI Console: Monitoring → Alarms → Alarm Details → Alarm History

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/Tasks/creatingalarms.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como importar resources de observabilidade existentes para o estado do Terraform?

Para importar resources de observabilidade existentes para o Terraform:

1. **Defina os resources vazios no código**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log_group" "imported_log_group" {
  compartment_id = "ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx"
  display_name   = "existing-log-group"
}

resource "oci_logging_log" "imported_log" {
  display_name = "existing-log"
  log_group_id = "ocid1.log.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx"
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "SERVICE"
}

resource "oci_monitoring_alarm" "imported_alarm" {
  compartment_id = "ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx"
  display_name   = "existing-alarm"
}

resource "oci_apm_apm_domain" "imported_apm_domain" {
  compartment_id = "ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx"
  display_name   = "existing-apm-domain"
}

resource "oci_ons_notification_topic" "imported_topic" {
  compartment_id = "ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx"
  name           = "existing-topic"
}
```

2. **Execute os imports**:
```bash
# Log Group
terraform import oci_logging_log_group.imported_log_group \
  ocid1.loggroup.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx

# Log (precisa do log OCID)
terraform import oci_logging_log.imported_log \
  ocid1.log.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx

# Alarm
terraform import oci_monitoring_alarm.imported_alarm \
  ocid1.alarm.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx

# APM Domain
terraform import oci_apm_apm_domain.imported_apm_domain \
  ocid1.apmdomain.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx

# Notification Topic
terraform import oci_ons_notification_topic.imported_topic \
  ocid1.onstopic.oc1.saopaulo-1.xxxxx
```

3. **Gere a configuração a partir do estado**:
```bash
terraform state show oci_logging_log_group.imported_log_group
terraform state show oci_monitoring_alarm.imported_alarm
```

4. **Ajuste o código HCL para match com o estado importado**:
```bash
terraform plan
```

5. **Dica para Log resources**:
- Logs do tipo SERVICE têm configuration que pode não importar completamente
- Verifique se `configuration.source` está correto após o import

6. **Para múltiplos resources, use um script**:
```bash
#!/bin/bash
COMPARTMENT="ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx"

for alarm in $(oci monitoring alarm list --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT --query 'data[*].id' --raw-output); do
  echo "Importing alarm: $alarm"
  terraform import oci_monitoring_alarm.imported_${alarm:0:8} $alarm
done
```

[CHECK DOCS] Verifique a documentação do provider OCI para mudanças no formato de import.

Ref: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como configurar retention policies para logs no OCI Logging via Terraform?

Para configurar retention policies de logs no OCI Logging via Terraform:

1. **Retention por log**:
```hcl
resource "oci_logging_log" "short_retention_log" {
  display_name = "debug-logs"
  log_group_id = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "CUSTOM"
  configuration {
    source {
      category    = "debug"
      source_type = "CUSTOM"
    }
  }
  # Retenção curta para logs de debug (alto volume)
  retention_duration = 7
}

resource "oci_logging_log" "long_retention_log" {
  display_name = "audit-logs"
  log_group_id = oci_logging_log_group.app_log_group.id
  is_enabled   = true
  log_type     = "SERVICE"
  configuration {
    source {
      category    = "audit"
      resource    = ""
      source_type = "OCISERVICE"
    }
  }
  # Retenção longa para compliance
  retention_duration = 365
}
```

2. **Estratégia de retention por tipo de log**:
```hcl
# Debug/Trace: 7 dias (alto volume, baixo valor)
retention_duration = 7

# Application logs: 30 dias
retention_duration = 30

# Security/Audit logs: 90-365 dias
retention_duration = 90

# Compliance logs: 365 dias
retention_duration = 365
```

3. **Archive logs para Object Storage (long-term)**:
```hcl
resource "oci_objectstorage_bucket" "log_archive" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  name           = "log-archive-bucket"
  namespace      = var.object_storage_namespace
  versioning     = "Enabled"

  object_lifecycle_policy {
    rules {
      name   = "archive-after-90-days"
      action = "ARCHIVE"
      time_amount = 90
      time_unit   = "DAYS"
      object_name_filter {
        inclusion_pattern = "*"
      }
    }
    rules {
      name   = "delete-after-1-year"
      action = "DELETE"
      time_amount = 365
      time_unit   = "DAYS"
      object_name_filter {
        inclusion_pattern = "*"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

4. **Custos de retenção**:
- OCI Logging cobra por GB ingerido e GB armazenado
- [MUTABLE] Retenção mais longa = maior custo
- Archive no Object Storage é mais barato que retenção no Logging

5. **Recomendações**:
- Use retenção curta para logs de debug/trace
- Use retenção média (30-90 dias) para application logs
- Use retenção longa + archive para compliance
- Configure lifecycle policies no Object Storage para archive automático

6. **Verifique o uso**:
```bash
oci logging log get --log-id <log-ocid> --query \"data.retention-duration\"
```

Ref: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/Concepts/configuringlogs.htm
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in observability resources. Provide technical guidance on logging, monitoring, and APM.
Como configurar uma stack completa de observabilidade (Logging + Monitoring + APM + Notifications) com Terraform?
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in terraform/observability. Provide technical guidance.
Como configurar terraform/observability no OCI?
Para configurar terraform/observability no OCI, consulte a documentação oficial em https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/
